raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.4": 3, "R1.7": 2, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 1, "RX.4": 3, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Mentions a few prior works but lacks a clear comparison to the nearest 3-5 works and their specific deltas.",
    "R1.7": "Contains factual citation errors (year for DiskANN, misclassification of ScaNN).",
    "RX.1": "Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty.",
    "RX.3": "The output does not adhere to the requested active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Identifies some potential regressions and harmful patterns but lacks a thorough analysis.",
    "RX.5": "Does not provide traceability for any changes made."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.4": 0.9, "R1.7": 0.8, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.6, "RX.4": 0.7, "RX.5": 0.7},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Mentions a few prior works but lacks a clear comparison to the nearest 3-5 works and their specific deltas.
rationale.R1.7: Contains factual citation errors (year for DiskANN, misclassification of ScaNN).
rationale.RX.1: Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output does not adhere to the requested active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Identifies some potential regressions and harmful patterns but lacks a thorough analysis.
rationale.RX.5: Does not provide traceability for any changes made.
